Atmospheric_FX.Spatial_Dust: Floating micro-motes, Tyndall particles, light-beam debris
Atmospheric_FX.Thermal_Realism: Exhaled white vapor at low temps, window condensation
Atmospheric_FX.Optical: Rim lighting, anamorphic bokeh, chromatic aberration, lens bloom
Atmospheric_FX.Post_Rain: Wet reflections, puddle splashes, rising mist, droplet trails, diffuse skylight

Weather_Vocabulary.cold_breath: visible white vapor from exhaled breath
Weather_Vocabulary.morning_mist: low-lying fog in cool humid conditions
Weather_Vocabulary.overcast_diffuse: soft, shadowless light from cloud cover
